title: Billable package auto-detect without folder clicking
description:
Create billable package no longer depends on you opening every Videos/Reports/Images folder first.

When you start the wizard, PipeShare recursively scans the selected package folder (full subtree listing) so PDFs, videos, images, ovality, and DB3 files are auto-detected immediately — even with shallow explorer browsing.

Who is affected: PipeShare billable package on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Billable package wizard scans the full package subtree before auto-detect.
No need to click through Videos/Reports/Images folders first.
Keeps prior Employee ↔ Customer instant switch and explorer speed fixes.
